title: Topas dosLa

{{Quote|Many of the worlds that we service, our neighbors, have already seceded. It is most prudent for us to continue serving them as best as possible. Furthermore, removed from the burden of Republic tariffs and bureaucracy, we will actually see a rise in efficiency and, eventually, profits for our farmers.|Overliege Topas dosLa|<ref name="hnn" />}}
'''Topas dosLa''' was an individual who ruled the [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]] as [[Overliege]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. On [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4:18]], the Overliege and the other [[Planet/Legends|world]] leaders of the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] chose to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and join the fledgling [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The choice was made by dosLa primarily due to the fact that many of the worlds that Ukio serviced had already seceded, and the Overliege felt it was prudent for Ukio itself to continue providing those services. In addition, dosLa's world would be free of the Republic tariffs.<ref name="hnn" />

Overliege dosLa was later quoted on [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], and the secession of the Abrion sector inspired debate within the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] as to whether or not they should approve subsidy packages for any [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] supplication worlds still within the Republic. With the removal of Republic tariffs that came with Ukio's secession, dosLa was confident that Ukio would enjoy new levels of profitability for his [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]], as well as an increase in efficiency.<ref name="hnn" />

==Behind the scenes==
Topas dosLa was mentioned in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52]]'', an article<ref name="hnn" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Master">'{{InsiderCite|91|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="hnn" /> on [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
